title: Chapter Headings - Kim
content:
Unto whose use the pregnant suns are poised,
    With idiot moons and stars retracting stars?
    Creep thou between, thy coming's all unnoised.
    Heaven hath her high, as Earth her baser, wars
    Heir to these tumults, this affright, that fray
    (By Adam�s, fathers�, own, sin bound alway);
    Peer up, draw out thy horoscope and say
    Which planet mends thy threadbare fate, or mars.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Rudyard Kipling delivers a powerful performance in "Chapter Headings - Kim"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
